---
id: outgoing-webhook-update
title: "Update an outgoing webhook of an app"
description: "Update an existing outgoing webhook (URL, events, secrets and headers) for a specified Bitrise app. Even if you do not want to change one of the parameters, you still have to provide that parameter as well: simply use its existing value."
sidebar_label: "Update an outgoing webhook of an app"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "put api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-api/api-reference/bitrise-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";
import NT from '@site/src/components/NT';

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Update an outgoing webhook of an app"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/outgoing-webhooks/{app-webhook-slug}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Update an existing outgoing webhook (URL, events, secrets and headers) for a specified <NT>Bitrise</NT> app. Even if you do not want to change one of the parameters, you still have to provide that parameter as well: simply use its existing value.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./outgoing-webhook-update.RequestSchema.json")}
>

>
  
</StatusCodes>
